Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */

Event Start RetornaAutorizacao.Call('WWDEVOLUCAOCOMPRA', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod &PesCod = &Context.PesCod &FiltroKey = 'FLT#wwDevolucaoCompraColumnsSelector' &UmZero = LoadColumnsSelectorState.Udp(&FiltroKey) Do CAse Case &UmZero = '2' &SalvarFiltro = false Case &UmZero = '1' &SalvarFiltro = true Otherwise RetornaConfUsuario.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.PesCod, domConfUsuario.Uconf001_PadraoFiltro, &UmZero) if &UmZero = '2' &SalvarFiltro = false Else &SalvarFiltro = true EndiF EndCase &FilCod.Clear() &Count = 0 tbFilialFaturamento.Visible = 0 tbFilialLancamento.Visible = 0 if &Context.FilialLancamento.Count > 1 tbFilialLancamento.Visible = 1 &PedFatFilCod = 0 for &FilialLancamento in &Context.FilialLancamento &FilCod.AddItem(&FilialLancamento.PesFilAce, substr(&FilialLancamento.PesFilRaz,1,20) ) &Count += 1 EndFor Else &FilCod.AddItem(&Context.FilCod, substr(&Context.FilRaz,1,20) ) &FilCod = &Context.FilCod Endif do 'montaFilialFaturamento' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ tbFilialFaturamento.Width = 90 tbFilialLancamento.Width = 90 &TCon083_Markup.Visible = False Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName DDO_GridColumnsSelector.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTCOD' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTCOD' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTCOD' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) ddo_Expp.Icon = icon_cog_col.Link() &ExppData = new() &ExppDataItem = new() &ExppDataItem.Title = 'Exportar Excel' &ExppDataItem.Icon = ActionExport.Link() &ExppDataItem.EventKey = !'Export' &ExppDataItem.IsDivider = False &ExppData.Add(&ExppDataItem) &ExppDataItem = new() &ExppDataItem.Title = 'Exportar PDF' &ExppDataItem.Icon = ActionExportReport.Link() &ExppDataItem.EventKey = !'ExportReport' &ExppDataItem.IsDivider = False &ExppData.Add(&ExppDataItem) If (&SalvarFiltro = false) &ExppDataItem = new() &ExppDataItem.Title = 'Salvar Filtros' &ExppDataItem.Icon = ActionManageFilters.Link() &ExppDataItem.EventKey = !'SalvaFiltros' &ExppDataItem.IsDivider = False &ExppData.Add(&ExppDataItem) Endif If (&SalvarFiltro = true) &ExppDataItem = new() &ExppDataItem.Title = 'Não Salvar Filtros' &ExppDataItem.Icon = ActionCleanFilters.Link() &ExppDataItem.EventKey = !'NaoSalvar' &ExppDataItem.IsDivider = False &ExppData.Add(&ExppDataItem) Endif &PedBlq = nullvalue(&PedBlq) &LctAtuSal = nullvalue(&LctAtuSal) &PedSts = nullvalue(&PedSts) &PedStsFin = nullvalue(&PedStsFin) Form.Caption = ' Lançamento Pedidos' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' &OrderedBy.Clear() &OrderedBy.AddItem(1, 'Ped. Decresc.') &OrderedBy.AddItem(2, 'Ped. Cresc.') &OrderedBy.AddItem(3, 'Prev. Decresc.') &OrderedBy.AddItem(4, 'Prev. Cresc.') &OrderedBy.AddItem(5, 'Nome Cliente') &OrderedBy.AddItem(6, 'Data Emissão Cresc.') &OrderedBy.AddItem(7, 'Data Emissão Decresc.') &OrderedBy.AddItem(8, 'Data Faturado Cresc.') &OrderedBy.AddItem(9, 'Data Faturado Decresc.') &OrderedBy.AddItem(10, 'Data Previsão Cresc.') &OrderedBy.AddItem(11, 'Data Previsão Decresc.') If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() DDO_GridColumnsSelector.TitleControlIdToReplace = BtnEditColumns.InternalName GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ If &PedDtaEms_To.IsEmpty() and &PedDtaEms.IsEmpty() &PedDtaEms_To = Serverdate() &PedDtaEms = &PedDtaEms_To - 30 Do 'SaveGridState' EndIF EndEvent Event Refresh &OldPedCliCod = &PedCliCod /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' If &Session.Get(!'wwDevolucaoCompraColumnsSelector') <> '' &ColumnsSelectorXML = &Session.Get(!'wwDevolucaoCompraColumnsSelector') &ColumnsSelector.FromXml(&ColumnsSelectorXML) Else Do 'InitializeColumnsSelector' EndIf PedCod.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(1).IsVisible &gridPedCliCodRaz.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(2).IsVisible PedDtaEms.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(3).IsVisible PedSts.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(4).IsVisible PedDtaPrv.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(5).IsVisible PedDtaFat.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(6).IsVisible &AuxFin.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(7).IsVisible PedVlrBrt.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(8).IsVisible PedVlrLiq.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(9).IsVisible PedVenCod.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(10).IsVisible LctCod.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(11).IsVisible PedFatFilCod.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(12).IsVisible PedNroNfeAut.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(13).IsVisible &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWTABELAPRECO', Status_SimNao.Nao, 2, &TabelaPrecoNiv) EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load &gridPedCliCodRaz.Link = VerPedido.Link('WWDEVOLUCAOCOMPRA', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) If PedNroNfeAut > 0 PedNroNfeAut.Link = VerNota.link(EmpCod,FilCod,PedCod) else PedNroNfeAut.Link = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &SupUpdate = !'' &ActioCompra.Clear() &ActioCompra.AddItem(0, 'WWP_ActionGroupCaption') If (PedSts = Status_Pedido.ABERTO or PedSts = Status_Pedido.SEPARANDO) &ActioCompra.AddItem(1, 'Fechar Estoque') Endif If (PedStsFin = Status_Financeiro.ABERTO) &ActioCompra.AddItem(2, 'Fechar Financeiro') Endif If (PedStsFin = Status_Financeiro.FECHADO) &ActioCompra.AddItem(3, 'Alterar Financeiro') Endif If (PedSts = Status_Pedido.FECHADO or PedSts = Status_Pedido.CANCELADO) &ActioCompra.AddItem(4, 'Abrir Estoque') Endif If ((PedSts in (Status_Pedido.ABERTO, Status_Pedido.SEPARANDO)) and (LctAtuSal <> Status_EntradaSaida.Nenhum)) &ActioCompra.AddItem(5, 'Emitir Nota') Endif &ActioCompra.AddItem(6, 'Críticas Pedido') If (PedSts = Status_pedido.ABERTO) &ActioCompra.AddItem(7, 'Cancelar Pedido') Endif &EnviarEmail = !'' &ImprimirPedido = !'' &gridPedCliCodRaz = iif(PedCliCodRaz.Length() > 30, Substr(PedCliCodRaz,1,30)+'...', PedCliCodRaz) &AuxFin = UPPER(Substr(PedStsFin.EnumerationDescription(), 1,3)) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Do Case Case PedStsFin = Status_Financeiro.CANCELADO &AuxFin.ForeColor = RGB(255, 132, 0) Case PedStsFin = Status_Financeiro.ABERTO &AuxFin.ForeColor = RGB(0, 100, 200) Otherwise &AuxFin.ForeColor = RGB(0, 0, 0) EndCase If PedSts = Status_Pedido.ABERTO &SupUpdate.Link = DevolucaoCompras.Link(TrnMode.Update, EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, 'WWDEVOLUCAOCOMPRA') &SupUpdate = !'' Else &SupUpdate.Link = VerPedido.Link('WWDEVOLUCAOCOMPRA', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) &SupUpdate = !'' Endif prcStatusPedidoRGB.Call(EmpCod, PedNovStsFinNom, &R, &G, &B ) PedStsFin.ForeColor = RGB(&R, &G, &B) prcStatusPedidoRGB.Call(EmpCod, PedNovStsNom, &R, &G, &B ) PedSts.ForeColor = RGB(&R, &G, &B) PedVenCod.TooltipText = trim(PedVenRaz) LctCod.TooltipText = Trim(LctNom) EndEvent Event DDO_GridColumnsSelector.OnColumnsChanged /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ColumnsSelectorXML = DDO_GridColumnsSelector.ColumnsSelectorValues &ColumnsSelector.FromJson(&ColumnsSelectorXML) SaveColumnsSelectorState(!'wwDevolucaoCompraColumnsSelector', &ColumnsSelector.ToXml()) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &ActioCompra.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case &ActioCompra = 1 Do 'Do FechaEstoqueFinanceiro' Case &ActioCompra = 2 Do 'Do FechaFinanceiro' Case &ActioCompra = 3 Do 'Do AlterarFinanceiro' Case &ActioCompra = 4 Do 'Do AbrirEstoquePedido' Case &ActioCompra = 5 Do 'Do EmitirNota' Case &ActioCompra = 6 Do 'Do Criticaspedido' Case &ActioCompra = 7 Do 'Do CancelarPedido' EndCase &ActioCompra = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Criticaspedido_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = WcCriticasDoPedido.Create(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoNewInsert' DevolucaoCompras.Link(TrnMode.Insert, &Context.EmpCod, &FilCod, 0, 'WWDEVOLUCAOCOMPRA') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event ddo_Expp.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case ddo_Expp.ActiveEventKey = !'Export' Do 'DoExport' Case ddo_Expp.ActiveEventKey = !'ExportReport' Do 'DoExportReport' Case ddo_Expp.ActiveEventKey = !'SalvaFiltros' Do 'Do SalvaFiltros' Case ddo_Expp.ActiveEventKey = !'NaoSalvar' Do 'Do NaoSalvar' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoTotalizar' RetornaTotalPedidosVendaGrid.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, &PedSts, &PedStsFin, &PedCliCod, &PedStsCrd, &PedDtaEms, &PedDtaEms_To, &PedDtaFat1, &PedDtaFat_To1, &LctCod1, &PedVenCod1,'C', &FinMedioMoeda,&medioMoeda,&PedidoMoeda,&QtdPedidos,&FinQtdPedido,&FinPedidoMoeda) //wpTotalizaPedidos.Popup(&FinMedioMoeda,&medioMoeda,&PedidoMoeda,&QtdPedidos,&FinQtdPedido,&FinPedidoMoeda) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Totalizar_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Totalizar_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wpTotalizaPedidos.Create(&FinMedioMoeda, &medioMoeda, &PedidoMoeda, &QtdPedidos, &FinQtdPedido, &FinPedidoMoeda) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoImpXMLCompra' &WebSession.Remove('ImportarXmlCompra_Data') &ImportarXmlCompraData.SelecionarXML.DeOndeVem = 'WWDEVOLUCAOCOMPRA' &ImportarXmlCompraData.SelecionarXML.PedFilCod = &FilCod //filial de lançamento &WebSession.Set('ImportarXmlCompra_Data', &ImportarXmlCompraData.ToJson()) ImportarXmlCompra.Link('SelecionarXML','SelecionarXML', false) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'Dosdd' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ wpLocalizaNotaPedido.PopUp(&EmpCod, &Pedcod) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'InitializeColumnsSelector' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ColumnsSelector = new WWPColumnsSelector() WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PedCod", '', !'Pedido', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&gridPedCliCodRaz", '', !'Razão Fornecedor', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PedDtaEms", '', !'Emissão', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PedSts", '', !'Estoq.', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PedDtaPrv", '', !'Previsão', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PedDtaFat", '', !'Faturado', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&AuxFin", '', !'Fin.', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PedVlrBrt", '', !'R$ Bruto', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PedVlrLiq", '', !'R$ Líq.', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PedVenCod", '', !'Vendedor', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"LctCod", '', !'Lct.', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PedFatFilCod", '', !'Fil.F', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PedNroNfeAut", '', !'NF-e', True, '') &UserCustomValue = LoadColumnsSelectorState.Udp(!'wwDevolucaoCompraColumnsSelector') If not(&UserCustomValue.IsEmpty()) &ColumnsSelectorAux.FromXml(&UserCustomValue) WWP_ColumnSelector_UpdateColumns(&ColumnsSelectorAux, &ColumnsSelector) EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &LctCod1.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaFat1.Visible = False &PedNum1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDDTAFAT' TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaFat1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDNUM' &PedNum1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &LctCod2.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaFat2.Visible = False &PedNum2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PEDDTAFAT' TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaFat2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PEDNUM' &PedNum2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &LctCod3.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaFat3.Visible = False &PedNum3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PEDDTAFAT' TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaFat3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PEDNUM' &PedNum3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do FechaEstoqueFinanceiro' &AutNiv = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('DEVOLUCAOFECHAESTOQUE', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1) If &AutNiv > 0 if not PedSts in (Status_Pedido.FECHADO, Status_Pedido.CANCELADO) VerificaLoteInformadoPedidoCompra.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, &IsTodosInformados, &Mensagem) If &IsTodosInformados <> true wpinformalotesfaltantespedidoVenda.Link('WWDEVOLUCAOCOMPRA', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) Else if (LctAtuEst <> Status_EntradaSaida.Nenhum) or LctGerFin = Status_SimNao.Sim wpFecharPedidoVendaIntegrado.Link('WWDEVOLUCAOCOMPRA', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) Else wpFecharPedidoDevolucao.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) Refresh Endif Endif Else msg('Pedido já Fechado ou Cancelado!') EndIF Else msg('Não Autorizado ao Nível de Fechar Estoque Pedido Venda. [DEVOLUCAOFECHAESTOQUE]') EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do FechaFinanceiro' &AutNiv = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('DEVOLUCAOFECHAFINANCEIRO', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1) If &AutNiv > 0 FechaFinanceiroPedidoVenda.Call('WWDEVOLUCAOCOMPRA', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, false) Else msg('Não Autorizado ao Nível de Fechar Financeiro Pedido Venda. [DEVOLUCAOFECHAFINANCEIRO]') EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do AlterarFinanceiro' &AutNiv = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('DEVOLUCAOFECHAFINANCEIRO', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1) If &AutNiv > 0 FechaFinanceiroPedidoVenda.Call('WWDEVOLUCAOCOMPRA', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, false) Else msg('Não Autorizado ao Nível de Fechar Financeiro Pedido Venda. [DEVOLUCAOFECHAFINANCEIRO]') EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do AbrirEstoquePedido' If PedSts = Status_Pedido.FECHADO &AutNiv = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('DEVOLUCAOABREESTOQUE', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1) If &AutNiv > 0 wpAbrirPedidoDevolucao.Link('WWDEVOLUCAOCOMPRA', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) Else msg('Não Autorizado ao Nível de Abrir Estoque Pedido Devolução. [DEVOLUCAOABREESTOQUE]') EndIF Else msg('Opção Disponível somente pedido Fechados!') EndiF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do EmitirNota' If PedCliBlqNfe = Status_simNao.Sim Msg('Atenção! Cliente com emissão fiscal bloqueado no cadastro, procure saber o motivo antes de desbloquear!') Else &AutNiv = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('DEVOLUCAOFECHAESTOQUE', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1) If &AutNiv > 0 Do Case Case LctAtuSal = Status_EntradaSaida.Nenhum msg('Pedido em Operação que não atualiza saldos, não permitido para fazer nota!') Case (PedSts <> Status_Pedido.ABERTO) And (PedSts <> Status_Pedido.SEPARANDO) msg('Somente pedidos com o status estoque "ABERTO" ou "SEPARANDO" pode fazer nota!') Otherwise VerificaLoteInformadoPedidoCompra.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, &IsTodosInformados, &Mensagem) If &IsTodosInformados <> true wpinformalotesfaltantespedidoVenda.Link('WWDEVOLUCAOCOMPRA', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) Else GravaNotaTemporariaVenda.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, '55') wpSelecionaProdutosNFe.Link('WWDEVOLUCAOCOMPRA', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) Endif EndCase Else msg('Não Autorizado ao Nível de Fechar Estoque Pedido Venda. [DEVOLUCAOFECHAESTOQUE]') EndIF EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Criticaspedido' // wpCriticasPedido.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Criticaspedido_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do CancelarPedido' &AutNiv = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('WWDEVOLUCAOCOMPRA', Status_SimNao.Nao, 3) If &AutNiv >= 3 if PedSts = Status_Pedido.ABERTO wpCancelaDevolucao.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) Refresh Else msg('Somente pedidos de devolução com status estoque ABERTO, podem ser cancelados!') EndIf Else msg('Não Autorizado ao Nível 3. Cancelar pedido devolução. [WWDEVOLUCAOCOMPRA]') EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do SalvaFiltros' saveColumnsSelectorState.Call('FLT#wwDevolucaoCompraColumnsSelector', '1') wwDevolucaoCompra.Link() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do NaoSalvar' saveColumnsSelectorState.Call('FLT#wwDevolucaoCompraColumnsSelector', '2') wwDevolucaoCompra.Link() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDBLQ" &PedBlq.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"LCTTIP" &LctTip.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"LCTATUSAL" &LctAtuSal.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDCOD" &PedCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDSTS" &PedSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDCLICOD" &PedCliCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDCLIRAZ" &PedCliRaz.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDSTSFIN" &PedStsFin.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FILCOD" &FilCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDFATFILCOD" &PedFatFilCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDDTAEMS" &PedDtaEms.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) &PedDtaEms_To.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.ValueTo) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDDTAFAT' &PedDtaFat1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) &PedDtaFat_To1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDNUM' &PedNum1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDBLQ", "", not &PedBlq.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedBlq, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"LCTTIP", "", not &LctTip.IsEmpty(), 0, &LctTip, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"LCTATUSAL", "", not &LctAtuSal.IsEmpty(), 0, &LctAtuSal, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDCOD", "", not &PedCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDSTS", "", not &PedSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedSts, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDCLICOD", "", not &PedCliCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedCliCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDCLIRAZ", "", not &PedCliRaz.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedCliRaz, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDSTSFIN", "", not &PedStsFin.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedStsFin, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"FILCOD", "", not &FilCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &FilCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDFATFILCOD", "", not &PedFatFilCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedFatFilCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDDTAEMS", "", not (&PedDtaEms.IsEmpty() AND &PedDtaEms_To.IsEmpty()), 0, &PedDtaEms.ToString().Trim(), &PedDtaEms_To.ToString().Trim()) Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTCOD' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDDTAFAT' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedDtaFat1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &PedDtaFat_To1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDNUM' AND not &PedNum1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedNum1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTCOD' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PEDDTAFAT' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedDtaFat2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &PedDtaFat_To2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PEDNUM' AND not &PedNum2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedNum2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTCOD' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PEDDTAFAT' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedDtaFat3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &PedDtaFat_To3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PEDNUM' AND not &PedNum3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedNum3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"Pedido" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'DoExport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate Excel spreadsheet and download it. Do 'LoadGridState' ExportwwDevolucaoCompra.Call(&ExcelFilename, &ErrorMessage) If (&ExcelFilename <> "") Link(&ExcelFilename) Else msg(&ErrorMessage) Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'DoExportReport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate PDF file. Do 'LoadGridState' InNewWindow1.Target = ExportReportwwDevolucaoCompra.Link() InNewWindow1.Height = !'600' InNewWindow1.Width = !'800' InNewWindow1.OpenWindow() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event &EnviarEmail.Click wpEnviaPedido.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) EndEvent Event &ImprimirPedido.Click wpimprimirPedidoCompra.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) EndEvent Sub 'montaFilialFaturamento' &PedFatFilCod.Clear() &PedFatFilCod.AddItem(0, '0 - TODAS FILIAIS') tbFilialFaturamento.Visible = 0 For &Filials in &Context.Filials &PedFatFilCod.AddItem(&Filials.FilCodVin, gxGetMLi(&Filials.FilRazVin, 1, 25)) EndFor if &Context.Filials.Count > 1 tbFilialFaturamento.Visible = 1 Endif EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
